subject: Labor Day Offer: Save 50% on a Times Subscription for a Limited Time Only.
body:
The New York Times Labor Day Sale

------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBT-awkB81HXJB87--ZAAwENcGR/viwb?t_params=CAMPAIGN_CODE%3D49K6L%26EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

Fall Fashion

Elections

Sports

ALL 50% OFF

LABOR DAY SALE 

SAVE 50% FOR 26 WEEKS ON
A TIMES SUBSCRIPTION

ENDS SEPTEMBER 3

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBT-awkB81HXJB87--ZAAwENcGR/sub01

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

Labor Day weekend is the perfect time to take advantage of 
big subscription savings. Now you can save 50% for a full 
26 weeks on a Times subscription. 

Choose whichever option works best for you: 

An Unlimited Digital subscription gives you unlimited access 
to our in-depth articles, immersive storytelling and innovative 
multimedia, from the world's finest journalists, on 
NYTimes.com and NYTimes smartphone and tablet apps. 

Home Delivery is the convenient way to get the unrivaled print 
edition of The Times, first thing in the morning. Your 
subscription includes unlimited access to NYTimes.com and 
NYTimes apps for your smartphone and tablet. Plus get a free 
additional log in so a friend or family member can also enjoy digital
access. 

Don't miss this opportunity to enjoy exceptional savings on 
your choice of Times subscriptions. 

ACT NOW! SALE ENDS SEPTEMBER 3!* 

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBT-awkB81HXJB87--ZAAwENcGR/sub02

-----------------------------------------------------------------

All subscriptions include:

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBT-awkB81HXJB87--ZAAwENcGR/sub03

-----------------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com. 

*This sale expires on September 4, 2014, 9 a.m. ET. 

Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. Does not 
include Times Premier content, e-reader editions or digital 
versions of The New York Times Crossword. Home Delivery 
promotional offer valid for new subscribers in areas served 
by The New York Times Delivery Service. 
Other restrictions apply. 

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times Labor Day Sale

Dear NYTimes.com Reader,

Labor Day weekend is the perfect time to take advantage of big subscription savings. Now you can save 50% for a full 26 weeks on a Times subscription.

Choose whichever option works best for you:

An Unlimited Digital subscription gives you unlimited access to our in-depth articles, immersive storytelling and innovative multimedia, from the world’s finest journalists, on NYTimes.com and NYTimes smartphone and tablet apps.

Home Delivery is the convenient way to get the unrivaled print edition of The Times, first thing in the morning.
